schema.note: expected_* fields are golden labels for the Phase 5 eval harness. sensitive=true means the escalation gate must route to human review regardless of confidence (money, disputes, account access, or legal).

tickets.text: I was billed $59.98 this month but my plan is supposed to be $29.99. Why was I charged twice?
Can you send me a receipt for last month's payment? I need it for an expense report.
There's a 'service fee' of $8.50 on my latest statement that nobody told me about. Please explain.
How do I switch my payment method from a card to a bank transfer?
I upgraded halfway through the month and the proration on my invoice looks wrong. Can someone check the math?
Why did my subscription jump from $19.99 to $24.99 with no notice at all?
I'd like to cancel my premium plan and get a refund. It's not what I expected. What's the process?
Your agent promised me a refund three weeks ago and I still haven't seen a cent. Where is my money?
I cancelled in February but was still charged for March. I want that month refunded.
I demand a full refund immediately, and my attorney will be in touch about your misleading pricing.
My 80-year-old father was talked into buying your premium tier he doesn't understand. Please cancel and refund him.
I'm locked out of my account. It keeps saying my password is wrong even though I'm certain it's right.
I just got a login-from-a-new-device alert that I did NOT trigger. Please lock my account now.
I forgot which email I used to sign up. How can I recover my account?
New phone, and I lost my authenticator app. How do I get my 2FA set back up?
Please permanently delete my account and all of my associated data.
My SMS verification codes aren't arriving and I need to authorize a transfer today.
There's a $520 charge on my card from Meridian that I never authorized. Reverse it or I'm calling my bank.
Four charges labeled MERIDIAN*PENDING for $75 each that I don't recognize are on my statement.
SOMEONE DRAINED MY ACCOUNT $3000 GONE OVERNIGHT PLEASE HELP RIGHT NOW
I believe my card details were used fraudulently through your platform last week. This needs to be investigated.
The mobile app crashes every time I open the Transactions tab. iPhone 14, latest app version.
Exporting my report to CSV just downloads an empty file. Chrome on Windows 11.
The entire site is just a spinning loader right now. Is there an outage?
Dashboard charts render as blank white boxes in Safari.
The search sometimes returns results from other users' workspaces. That seems like a privacy problem.
The two-factor page throws a 500 error every time I click submit.
Your service has gone down three times this month. Completely unacceptable for something I pay for.
I've been on hold with phone support for two hours. Twice. Worst support experience of my life.
'Premium support' that takes five days to answer an email. Really feeling the premium here.
I received another customer's account statement in my email. You have a serious data problem.
Hi! Just wondering what your customer support hours are. Thanks!
How do I update my billing address?
Does the free tier include API access?
What file formats can I use to upload documents?
hi
Can I get a copy of all my transactions from January to March for my accountant?
Would love a dark mode for the dashboard. My eyes would thank you.
Please add PDF export for reports. Excel-only is limiting for our team.
It'd be great if monthly invoices could be emailed automatically instead of manual download.
